title: بورتريه فاخر
promptText: Create a luxury cinematic portrait with soft studio lighting, premium fashion styling, highly detailed skin texture, elegant composition, realistic shadows, ultra clean background.

title: إعلان منتج
promptText: Create a premium product advertisement with dramatic lighting, reflective surface, high-end commercial style, realistic details, sharp focus, luxury branding mood.

character.skin_tone: light skin tone with warm undertones
character.skin_details: natural skin texture, slight water reflections on skin
character.facial_expression: slight squint due to sunlight, relaxed lips, subtle playful expression

eyes.state: one eye partially closed, one eye squinting
eyes.gaze_direction: looking directly at the camera from above

character.lips: natural pink lips, slightly pressed together

hair.visibility: mostly pulled back, minimal loose strands

pose.head_position: tilted slightly upward toward the camera
pose.shoulders: raised slightly out of the water

arms.position: arms extended upward holding the camera
arms.visibility: upper arms visible near frame edges

pose.body_orientation: upper torso facing camera, submerged from upper chest downward

environment.water_effects: sunlight caustics reflecting on skin and swimsuit
environment.background: no visible horizon, only water surrounding subject

clothing.details: simple straps, no patterns, minimalistic design

lighting.contrast: high contrast between highlights and shadows
lighting.highlights: bright reflections on water and skin

composition.framing: tight crop, subject centered slightly off-axis
composition.focus: sharp focus on face and upper torso

technical.resolution: high resolution, detailed skin and water tex
